assertions: acceptance_met: all criteria measured/met (or honestly re-graded with reproducible proof) under re-run
quota_refute: ideation quota + refutation with honest kills
fair_gates: tuned baseline + holdout + ablation executed
provability_upgrade: claims upgraded beyond 'measured' where the type allows, rung stated
provenance_live: real search log, anticipation/combination tests, known art labeled
disclosure_and_rubric: disclosure block + §8 self-rank with verification gate
control_run: whale/no-whale but-for comparison constructed and used
